workload_shape.notes: Regression probe for the quarantined cc-builder-1|sonnet combo (pour-c2 timeout -> quarantine). Small deterministic wordcount task. Clean lap: agent_rc 0, not timed out, assay 167/167 pass, score 70/B. Materialized to lift the quarantine. promote was disabled (promote:false) so promotion_status is not a quality signal.
